items.text: 传感器自带的M4内六角螺丝

regions.content_en: 1. Front force measuring surface mounting holes: 6 x M4 threaded holes, depth 6mm; 2. Front locating pin holes: 2 x ∅5∇6; 3. Sensor comes with 6 M4 hexagon socket head cap screws, front mounting, maximum screw protrusion length 6mm; 4. Rear mounting surface locating pin holes: 2 x ∅5∇4.

labels.translation_en_full: 6 pieces M4 hexagon socket head cap screws

records.translation_en_full: 6 pieces M4 hexagon socket head cap screws

items.text: 1.正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm;
正面的定位销孔是2个の56;
2.传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，
螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm;
3.背面安装面的定位销孔是2个の54。
